author: Bernhard von Waging
title: Ordinarium missae practicum
remarks: Cf. Franz 567ff. Clm 7007, 1-109b; Clm 18548b, 1-100. See the project on his collected works: https://www.bernhard-von-waging.uni-muenchen.de/projekt/index.html. Bernhard von Waging, Ordinarium, ed. by Wolfgang Steck, Münster (Contributions to the History of Ancient Monasticism and Benedictineism, new series: Editions, Vol. III.2)
